rationale: Section 25.03 governs how property is described in appraisal records, including manufactured home identification requirements. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Property shall be described in the appraisal records with sufficient certainty to identify it.
_note: §25.03 concerns property description standards, not exemption amounts; no conflict with proposed §11.13(b) increase.
